headline: GEHC Moves Manganese-Based MRI Contrast Agent Into Phase 2/3 Trial
summary: GE HealthCare doses first patient in Phase 2/3 LUMINA trial for mangaciclanol, a manganese MRI contrast agent with FDA Fast Track status.
